Today, we’ll tell you about a new location, new mechanics for large-scale battles, changes based on your feedback, and dozens of gameplay refinements. If you haven’t participated in any testing yet, now’s the perfect time to apply ! Welcome to Kivu [carousel] [/carousel] (Click the arrow to see the next image. Click the image to enlarge) For the third testing stage, we’ve prepared a new, large-scale location c

entries.title: Discover the Honeyglow Woods Adventure Pack!
entries.description: Hey Valley Villagers, A brand-new cozy chapter begins today in Disney Dreamlight Valley as you step through a magical gateway into the Honeyglow Woods, a forgotten land where childhood memories, beloved friends, and the gentle magic of honey lingers just beyond the fog. A Mysterious Invitation Your journey begins with a mysterious package left in your mailbox, containing treasured childhood keepsakes and a curious little Tree Sprout. Once planted, the Tree Sprout grows into a magical gateway to

entries.title: You're invited to Destiny's cursed unofficial final raid: Pete Carsons' Vault of Cars
entries.description: The reasons behind the decline and ultimate end of Destiny 2 will always be a topic of discussion. It's, in my opinion, one of the biggest fumbles in entertainment history. No one thing is to blame, but former Bungie CEO and avid car collector Pete Parsons , who retired in August 2025 as sentiment was at an all-time low and pressure from Sony grew, is the focus of much of the ire. "I hope all your cars break down," one player wrote in a cheerful farewell to the departing CEO last year, in a rare

entries.title: Excerpt from a Frontier Instructor's Journal
entries.description: Today we trained alongside the Typhoon operatives. I expected another batch of rookies decked out in expensive gear. I was wrong. They're well-trained, no doubt about it. But there's one key difference between us. They see the Zone as a mission. We know the Zone is a force of nature, and no amount of training or procedure can truly prepare you for it. We put their new suits through their paces. Impressive equipment. But when the batteries run dry and the electronics let you down, experience is a

entries.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access 1.1 - Adaptive Measures Update
entries.description: Hello Subnauts, Subnautica 2’s Early Access 1.1 update, Adaptive Measures , is out now! This update includes a ton of quality-of-life fixes, including the much-requested FOV slider, and adds targeted improvements to the game. Anything marked with a 🤿 indicates a change that came directly from community feedback! The Adaptive Measures update should appear as a free, automatic download. If the update doesn’t appear for you, you may need to restart Steam. If you continue to experience issues, pleas

entries.title: Xbox's Bethesda layoffs include the artist responsible for designing Skyrim's khajiit and argonians, who had been at the company for 27 years
entries.description: If you've ever liked the character designs of an Elder Scrolls game, chances are you've met with some of Christiane Meister's work—as a senior character artist, Meister's been with the company for 27 years (which is only four years fewer than I, the person writing this, have been alive ). She's worked on every game from Morrowind to Skyrim, and she was caught in the wave of Xbox's first round of layoffs this week... Read more.

entries.title: Bilibili World 2026，link by love！
entries.description: Bilibili World is an offline event brand created by Bilibili in 2017. It is a comprehensive entertainment carnival that includes performances, exhibitions, interactive entertainment games, and other aspects. This year's BW will be held from July 10th to July 12th in all 8 indoor exhibition halls of the National Convention and Exhibition Center (Shanghai), interacting with over 1000 guests and UP hosts from around the world. At the same time, from July 9th to 17th, the "Bilibili World 2026 Online

entries.title: Players prove Destiny 2 can still produce wonders with discovery of poopy pants transmog
entries.description: Destiny 2 has entered its long goodnight. Despite earlier assurances that Destiny 2 will "remain playable" for the foreseeable future, the studio now seems to be signaling that its ability to ensure the game's ongoing health is constrained. Even if Bungie and Sony had the will to ensure Destiny 2's sandbox stays fulfilling in its sunset years, they'd struggle to find someone to make it happen—because most of the Destiny team was cut loose last month ... Read more.

entries.title: Marvel Rivals' Season 9 update will affect 80% of its roster as NetEase throws balance out the window for a more 'fun' approach to the game
entries.description: Marvel Rivals will open the doors to the "most massive overhaul to the combat system since launch" that affects roughly 80% of its hero roster when Season 9 kicks off in a couple of days. There's hero reworks, a massive change to Team-Ups, and a substantial ultimate charge nerf... Read more.

entries.title: Expansions Hub and TarCoin
entries.description: The Expansions Hub has arrived - an in-game store offering a more flexible selection of items than the “Expansions” page on the official website. Below are answers to some common questions about the Expansions Hub. What is TarCoin? TarCoin is an in-game currency used exclusively within the Expansions Hub. TarCoins can be found in raids. Once you successfully extract with them, they will automatically be converted into your Tarcoin account balance. TarCoins can also be purchased via the Expansion

entries.title: Less than 3 years after it launched on Steam, the Final Fantasy 7 gacha game is closing
entries.description: Less than three years after it went live on Steam, Final Fantasy 7: Ever Crisis is calling it quits. Square Enix said in an end-of-service announcement that the sale of Red Crystal in-game currency has already been halted, and the game itself will be taken offline on October 6... Read more.

entries.title: A bigger arsenal is on its way in the next big Barony update!
entries.description: Welcome! I want to take a moment to welcome the new Barony fans! Thanks so much for taking a dive into the dungeons, and for your interest in what more we have in store for you in our next major update. It's been a ton of fun watching the new adventurers pour in during the Steam Summer sale. So, a hearty welcome to you from the Barony community! If you're new here and want to find people to talk about and play Barony with, join our Discord ! IOD:Part 2 Equipment Dev Diary Looking forward to usin

entries.title: MindsEye developers protest against a fan event their own studio is hosting
entries.description: "Just when I thought I was out," Al Pacino hissed in The Godfather Part 3, "they pull me back in!" I'm starting to feel that way about MindsEye , the infamously bad action game from Build a Rocket Boy: I played it, I had an accidental good time , the expansion was abysmally bad , and it was over. But now, for suitably bizarre reasons, it's back in my life... Read more.

entries.title: Season 5, Armory, and More
entries.description: Reporting for Active Duty Cache has officially arrived, and replaces Overpass in the active duty map pool. Put your hard-earned strats to the test and rise through the Premier ranks in CS2's newest battlefield. Get out of there, it's gonna blow! Season 5 has arrived with some explosive changes to CS2--bomb damage has been completely reworked. Now, when the bomb detonates, an explosive wave of destruction will flow from the bombsite through the map. As before, if you're too close to the bomb when

entries.title: Where to find Blackbeard's Treasure in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: Finding Blackbeard's Treasure in Black Flag Resynced is actually a lot tougher than the game's other treasure maps, mainly because it doesn't give you any coordinates, forcing you to rely on your knowledge of the Caribbean. This is a new quest that was added in Resynced, but you won't get it until after you complete the Do Not Go Gently main quest... Read more.

entries.title: All 22 treasure map locations in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: Is there anything more piratey than searching for buried treasure ? I think not. Digging up the treasure map locations was one of my favourite side activities in the original game, and that's not changed in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced . If you completed everything in the original and thought you knew it like the back of your hand, you don't now. The tectonic plates have shifted, as the remake has moved the location of major islands, and the clues are different too... Read more.

entries.title: All 16 Mayan stone locations in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: Finding all the Mayan stone locations is one of your big distractions while sailing the Caribbean in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced , and it's mostly unchanged from the original game. You still need to solve 16 of these stele to complete the Mayan Mystery task and unlock the Mayan Armour, one of the best outfits . But just like the treasure maps , a few locations have shifted around in the remake... Read more.

entries.title: How to get all 12 Ultimate Ship Plans in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: The Elite Ship Upgrades from the original game have been renamed in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced . Now called Ultimate Ship Plans , these schematics still serve the same purpose: fully upgrading the Jackdaw. So you'll want to find each and every one of the locations if you're hoping to take on the legendary ships ... Read more.

entries.title: How to get all 28 outfits in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: Just like the original game, getting all the outfits isn't simple in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced , but for a slightly different reason. Most outfits are still bought from the merchants or crafted, but a few have moved locations for no apparent reason... Read more.

entries.title: How to beat all four legendary ships in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: Legendary ships were the pinnacle challenge of the Caribbean in the original, and they return even stronger in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced . These boss battles now have more unique gimmicks and phases, and pack a serious punch. But you've got a lot more tools of destruction to deal with them, the rewards have changed, and they now respawn so you can fight them again... Read more.

entries.title: How to access Black Flag Resynced's new content in order
entries.description: Though it makes a variety of changes to the original, Black Flag Resynced adds quite a lot of new content to the much-beloved Assassin's Creed instalment. There's a boatload of new sidequests, including a whole new chapter you unlock later in the game. There are also tweaks to combat, stealth, the Jackdaw, and legendary ships ... Read more.

entries.title: How to complete the Art Lover quest in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: Completing the Art Lover quest in Black Flag Resynced sees you finding art pieces from Great Inagua's scattered collection to return them to the manor. This is one of the new quests that was added in Resynced, alongside a new character, Bernard. This aged butler served the previous owner of the house before Du Casse took it over... Read more.

entries.title: How to get Data Fragments in Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: I'm not sure who asked for daily quests and what is essentially a battle pass in Black Flag Resynced , but here we are. Similar to Shadows, you can earn Data Fragments to spend on unlocking special cosmetics and keys in your Animus projects... Read more.

entries.title: Former Destiny 2 and Marathon director settles $200 million lawsuit against Sony and Bungie: 'The outcome is one I am very satisfied with'
entries.description: Former Destiny 2 and Marathon director Christopher Barrett has settled his lawsuit against Sony and Bungie. Terms of the settlement were not disclosed, but Barrett implied a favorable outcome, saying he's "very satisfied" with it... Read more.

entries.title: Important: About MODs and 1.0!
entries.description: Palworld and Pocketpair support modding, and we're grateful to all our fans who have dedicated time into modding the game up now. We look forward to seeing all the amazing MODs that will be made after 1.0. However, if you haven't played the game in a long time then it is possible you may have old and potentially harmful MOD data still on your PC. The upcoming 1.0 update for Palworld makes significant changes to the game’s systems. If you still have MODs installed from the past, especially MODs t

The process of resolving these issues has taken considerable time, resulting in prolonged inconvenience. We sincerely apologize for the lack of stable service. entries.title: Preliminary Notice on Error Popups After the 7/9 Scheduled Update
entries.description: Hello, this is Project Moon. Following the Scheduled Update on Jul. 9th, we have confirmed an issue in which error messages appear during gameplay due to higher-than-expected server load. We are currently investigating the issue and will provide a follow-up notice once we have identified the exact cause. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Added new internal 'state system', integrated with all menus, interactions, etc. Added platform-integrated fullscreen fade. (prevents unintentional input when the Steam overlay is opened). As always, should you run into any new issues after updating to 8.1, don’t hesitate to report it over in our dedicated bug reporting sub-forum . See you on the battlefield! — Steve Coleman // Senior Community Manager 1. Campaign AI Improvements With Patch 8.1 a num

entries.title: Albion Football Clash zbliża się do półfinału!
entries.description: To, co zaczęło się jako eksperyment polegający na kopaniu jednego z gospodarzy AlbionTV po prowizorycznym boisku, szybko przerodziło się w jedną z najbardziej szalonych rywalizacji, jakie kiedykolwiek widzieliśmy. Od pierwszego gwizdka twórcy contentu i ich ekipy przekonali się, że strzelanie goli za pomocą zaklęć odrzucających jest o wiele, wiele trudniejsze, niż się wydaje… Teraz, po tygodniach zaciekłych meczów, droga do finału stoi otworem. Półfinaliści zostali wyłonieni, i już w tę sobotę ,

entries.title: Twitch Extension
entries.description: Hi folks and especially content creators! With 8.1 we've launched a Twitch Extension that allows creators to stream Total War on Twitch and let their viewers engage with their stream via polls and raffles! This has been a small passion project that was slowly developed in the background over the last year, and the functionality is focused on allowing viewers to naturally integrate into the experience, rather than dramatically alter it. We've learned a lot from the implementation of this extensio

entries.title: Monthly Decals for July!
entries.description: Hey everyone! We’re back with a new set of decals for you for July, we hope you’re staying cool! We have quite an eclectic mix this time around with a little bit of everything, personal markings, squadron markings, graffiti, the lot. We have also discovered that our decal artist dislikes clowns very much, sorry Fenris! We’ve also got a small survey for you if you have the time, just some short questions about the monthly decal event, what decals you like, whether the event enhances your enjoymen

When tackling any of these emergent World Events, the chances of players finding one or even multiple Chests of Fortune have now been significantly increased! Fixed Issues Gameplay The following World Events now provide a chance of discovering a Chest of Fortune as intended: Skelet

entries.title: Stellaris Dev Diary #428 - 4.5 ‘Cygnus’
entries.description: by Eladrin Hello everyone! Earlier this week we released the Stellaris 4.4.5 ‘Pegasus’ Update with the following changes: 4.4.5 ‘Pegasus’ Patch Release Notes Feature Added a Resource Abundance slider in galaxy settings. This slider ranges from “Scarce” to x5 in 0.25 increments, where x1 is approximately the resource abundance of v4.3 and x5 is essentially 4.4’s “resources everywhere”. The default is x2. We do recognize that this is a little confusing, but it gives you more control of getting it

entries.title: Subnautica 2 celebrates 5 million copies sold ahead of Adaptive Measures, its first early access update
entries.description: It comes as a surprise to absolutely no one that Subnautica 2 has finally surpassed 5 million copies sold. It did sell two million copies in just 12 hours after all . Then, not that long ago, it broke 4 million copies sold, which was excellent for everyone involved except for Krafton . And now its 5 million copies sold coincides with its first major update in early access, 1.1... Read more.

entries.title: Super Credits & A Fairer Galactic War
entries.description: Cheaters have been a top topic in player feedback since launch, and today we are united in dealing a hefty blow to their undemocratic ways! Greetings, Helldivers. You've told us that cheaters and exploiters ruin the experience that it feels unfair when someone games the Super Credit system while you're out there earning yours the hard way. We heard you, and we're starting to implement changes that will tackle issues like this... Today we’re improving our monitoring methods for suspicious Super C

The shadow meets its light. [color=#66ccff] Lumina awakens in Dragontopia [/color]! Taking flight as Umbra's radiant counterpart and bringing a brilliant new force to the skies! With celestial power at her command and a bond that burns brightest beside her shadowed kin, Lumina

It should now be available on Steam, GOG, and MS Store. 4.4.6 ‘Pegasus’ Hotfix Release Notes Bugfix ​ Fixed science ships being lost permanently when set to automatically explore Astral Rifts. Previously an automated science ship would vanish upon reaching a rift and never return, leaving its scientist stranded and cluttering

entries.title: Launch into Season 11 | Galaxy Masters!
entries.description: SEASON 11 | GALAXY MASTERS WELCOME ABOARD Explore the new Map, the reworked Melee Combat System, the new Cashout Bot mode, Competitive updates and so much more! entries.title: Black Flag's combat may have been a total cakewalk, but at least it had its novelty
entries.description: Black Flag Resynced has finally launched, and with it, a reprisal of the eternal debate surrounding the different stripes of Assassin's Creed combat. As Morgan notes in our review , Resynced ultimately "loses more than it gains" thanks to its wide-ranging changes masquerading as quality of life, and I'm inclined to agree... Read more.

entries.description: For the most part, the long-awaited and worst-kept secret, Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced , is very faithful to one of my favourite games from 13 years ago. And anything that's brand-new, like some islands, the ship officers, and an extended story, fits in pretty seamlessly, almost like they were there in the original... Read more.

entries.title: After 16 years of exploring the final frontier, Star Trek Online devs are 'trying new things' and 'trying to push the boundaries' of what they can achieve
entries.description: It's the 16th anniversary of Star Trek Online this year, and the 60th anniversary of Star Trek itself. That's an absurdly long time for both MMOs and TV shows. For fans of the shows, though, it's bittersweet, as the two remaining ones are now rushing towards their post-cancellation conclusions. Star Trek Online, on the other hand, feels like it's entering a new era... Read more.

entries.title: Known Issue Update: Cutscenes Locked to 30FPS on PC (Workaround)
entries.description: Hello Assassins, We are aware that there is an issue where cutscenes on PC are locked to 30 FPS when using Raytracing, BVH or Terrain Quality at Ultra High setting. We have a fix coming soon, but in the meantime, we've provided a temporary workaround: Reset the graphics Overall Preset to any pre-configured setting and avoid manually setting Raytracing, BVH or Terrain Quality to the Ultra High setting. entries.title: How do you put a price tag on a legacy like id Software's?
entries.description: In 1984, an upstart retail company called Costco had just opened its first handful of voluminous warehouse stores on the west coast of the United States when it decided to try an experiment. It installed a hot dog cart in front of its San Diego store and started selling Hebrew Nationals with a drink for $1.50. People, it turned out, liked the hot dogs. The cart became Cafe 150, named for the combo price... Read more.

Whether you've been planning to venture into the Zone or discover Elhant's destiny in Heroes of Annihilated Empires, now is the perfect time to jump in. Just don't forget to stay hydrated.

entries.title: Where to find the fallen tree and unblock the waterfall in Moonlight Peaks
entries.description: During the quest The Mysterious Bay you're going to need to lift a fallen tree in Moonlight Peaks to help your newly-discovered mermaid neighbors rejoin the town proper. After you get the rundown, you might wind up scratching your head over where that tree you're supposed to clear was. It certainly isn't nearby in the Howling Marshes where you'd assume... Read more.

entries.title: Indie dev defends criticism of Steam refund abuse amid review bombing of his game: 'It's wrong to refund a game after having fun with it and completing it'
entries.description: Developer Mateo Covic, who went viral for complaining that thousands of people had refunded his game after finishing it in less than two hours, says he's not actually unhappy about the number of refunds or money he lost, or even Steam's policy in general—he was merely expressing frustration with players who "bragged about having a fun time with the game and refunding it after completion.".. Read more.

entries.title: Bonus Discounts? WTF!?
entries.description: Hello fellow Binders! ( to all the new players, that's what all Isaac fans call themselves ) Edmund here! The games creator! We have recently had a giant influx of new players, as well as a slew of old players jump back into the mix again.. so i thought id gather together some of the more common questions i see floating around. entries.title: How to unlock Samael's romance and begin dating the brooding bartender in Moonlight Peaks
entries.description: I don't blame you for loading up Moonlight Peaks and saying: "Wait, how are you supposed to date Samael?" The broody bartender is easily the most conventionally attractive guy in town. If you peeked at the datable candidates list for Moonlight Peaks, you'll have seen Samael featured alongside all the other eligible townies. When you start playing, though, you notice pretty quickly that Samael only has four friendship hearts in his relationship panel unlike the other bachelors, so what gives?.. R

entries.title: Palworld revises some of its most egregious creature designs for its 1.0 release
entries.description: Today, Palworld left early access with a massive 1.0 patch that brought an avalanche of changes and has drawn hundreds of thousands of new and returning players with the seductive allure of making creatures work in conditions that OSHA would object to if they were people... entries.title: How to get hardwood in Palworld
entries.description: The Palworld 1.0 update sure is a big one, and with all of the new pals, weapons, and zones to track it's easy to miss the little things—like new resources for crafting. As I climbed the revamped tech tree again, I breezed through most recipes until I ran into hardwood. It's a new tier of the basic building block you'll see pop up in later level recipes (around 40 to 50), after planks... Read more.

entries.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced sells 2 million copies in 1 day and achieves the 'highest concurrent player count ever recorded for an Assassin's Creed title' on Steam
entries.description: I gotta hand this one to the suits: I thought gamers might find a $60 price tag on a rehash of a 13-year-old Assassin's Creed game to be a bit much, and apparently I was wrong. Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced sold more than two million copies in just one day, and has handily surpassed Steam player counts of newer games in the series, including Assassin's Creed Shadows... Read more.

entries.title: 'Surprised there was anyone left to post this': Fans react as The Elder Scrolls Online debuts seasonal content days after hundreds laid off from studio
entries.description: For the first time ever, seasonal content is here for The Elder Scrolls Online. Return of the Thieves Guild, its inaugural season, has launched for the long-running MMO, something you'd expect fans would be all abuzz for—if not for the fact that ZeniMax Online Studios has been gutted as part of the mass layoffs at Xbox this week... From allies to trees, bushes, and resources, nothing is safe from its seemingly bottomless belly. The coins are distributed as follows: · 1 coin for completing the mandatory Triumph; · 4 coins for completing 4 advanced Triumphs; · 5 coins for completing 5 simple Triumphs. You can receive 1 additional coin for participating in the Faction Race. To do so, you need to complete 3 Triumphs and be a member of the Northern faction. MMOs aren't exactly a dying breed, per se—we've got Guild Wars 3 to look forward to, and most of the old guard, while a little grey in the beard, have respectable playerbases and are thrumming with things to do... entries.title: I've found my perfect summer game: A stomach-churning horror story about Czech train conductors built over a bafflingly deep simulation of a fictional subway
entries.description: I've developed a bit of a reputation among my coworkers for loving niche, lo-fi indie games that make you feel bad and gross and weird on the inside. I'm flattered to stand out in such a way, but I also don't ever want to be typecast. Anyway, Brno Transit is a game about being trapped underground with your nasty, weirdly sexual boss and neurotic coworkers as reality disintegrates around you... Read more.

entries.title: Obsidian game director is sick of hearing bad takes about the state of the studio: 'The through line from KotOR2 to our current games is pretty clear'
entries.description: Earlier this month, Microsoft announced "the most significant restructure in Xbox history", which is what you call it when you lay off thousands of people and cut four game studios loose . Double Fine and Compulsion Games returned to their indie roots; Ninja Theory and Undead Labs were sold off. While it seemed at first like Obsidian Entertainment had avoided the headsman's axe, we soon found out they were also hit with plenty of layoffs of their own ... Read more.

entries.title: You can mod out the yellow filter in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
entries.description: fter Traffic and Breaking Bad used it for scenes set there it became know as "the Mexican filter", though it's sometimes used for scenes set in South Asia or anywhere a bit tropical. You may recognize it as "the piss filter" that stained the original incarnation of Deus Ex: Human Revolution. It's the yellow gradient that's usually intended to make things look warm, and it's not to everyone's taste. Like piss, I guess... Read more.

entries.description: What's old is new in League of Legends Classic, which was teased a couple of weeks ago in the wake of leak after leak. The full reveal came during yesterday's MSI Finals, where the mode debuted in a showmatch starring pros like Doublelift and Cpt Jack. It's a Frankenstein's monster of different eras with a huge emphasis on season three: a bunch of old kits are back, but some of the art has been modernized and various late additions like ward trinkets have made it in... entries.title: Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer reveals his optimal outcome for the Mojave Wasteland
entries.description: Fallout: New Vegas is a sprawling RPG filled with sketchy factions, greasy NPCs, rubbery morality, and tough decisions, all of which ultimately lead the player to one of four possible outcomes that share one thing in common: They're not great. Which isn't to say they're not satisfying, just that there's no optimal outcome where everybody's happy and nobody gets hurt. The wasteland is a pretty crappy place, after all, so outcomes tend to be crappy too... Read more.

entries.title: 'The company has turned its back on us': Black Flag Resynced developers at Ubisoft Barcelona are being laid off instead of celebrating the series' latest hit
entries.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced has been a massive success for Ubisoft, having sold two million copies in a day and breaking the series' concurrent player records on Steam by nearly 40,000. Despite this good news, the company is planning to lay off 51 developers at Ubisoft Barcelona. These layoffs were announced last month , alongside reductions at Ubisoft's teams in Winnipeg and Belgrade... Read more.

entries.title: Decals and a Discount on the Vautour IIN for Bastille Day!
entries.description: On July 14th 1789, the Bastille fortress-prison fell, becoming a pivotal event of the French Revolution. More than 90 years later, this date began to be celebrated as a national holiday. In the 20th century, a military parade on the Champs-Élysées was added to the festivities, featuring the Patrouille de France painting the world-famous tricolor in the sky with smoke! entries.title: Doom: The Dark Ages – Revelations review
entries.description: Don't scoff at it being a DLC: Revelations is the best Doom has ever been. Hell, it would be worthy of being a standalone sequel if it weren't so tightly woven with the base game in ways id Software joyfully refuses to do with its full-fledged follow-ups. While I adored The Dark Ages ' visceral demon-crushing, its level design fell flat. Some levels were too linear; some were needlessly open. So I wasn't expecting to enjoy the DLC too much before I went in... Read more.

entries.title: How to get Ancient Bone in Palworld
entries.description: Finding Ancient Bone in Palworld is rather tricky if you haven't clocked that each of the three ancient materials come from the wildlife sanctuaries dotted around the islands. These areas are easy to recognise because of the big shield domes protecting them, but that does mean you have to sneak about and avoid their protectors while doing your illicit mining... Read more.

entries.title: Iceland: Bridges
entries.description: Today, we're excited to take you on another journey through the upcoming Iceland DLC for Euro Truck Simulator 2 . This time, we're focusing on one of the country's fascinating pieces of infrastructure - its bridges. Although Iceland is known for its dramatic volcanoes, glaciers, and waterfalls, every trucker's journey depends on something a little less obvious: the bridges that connect communities across the landscape. From narrow crossings over glacial rivers to long bridges spanning waterways,

Alas, it did not fare quite as well, because—bluntly—it wasn't great. It faded into memory fairly quickly, recalled occasionally by die-hard fans of the genre and not many others, but never with enough affection to warrant a second chance... Read more.

entries.title: Steve Buscemi joins the Far Cry TV series cast and now we're all wondering: will he be a weird, helpful NPC, or a weirdly charismatic villain?
entries.description: Have you ever thought to yourself, I bet Steve Buscemi would make a good Far Cry villain? I think he would. He's charismatic, superficially good-natured, kind of odd looking, extremely high-strung, and prone to sudden, sometimes random outbursts of extreme violence. And I'm not the only one who thinks so—the people making the live-action Far Cry series for FX do, too... Read more.

entries.title: Moonlight Peaks review
entries.description: "A nocturnal farm sim where you're a vampire" is one of the better hooks I've heard lately in a subgenre that's long become overstuffed with too many same-y, saccharine rural community sims. Moonlight Peaks' slightly spooky theme is a welcome twist, but that's where its originality ends, because it struggles to ever turn that concept into a story with any bite... Read more.

entries.title: The Washington Post selects Doom as one of the 25 'most influential works of American culture'
entries.description: We often talk about Doom—the original 1993 shooter from the young upstarts at id Software—as one of the most influential videogames of all time . But the Washington Post, one of the country's most highly-regarded papers of record, has elevated it to an even higher plateau: It has selected Doom as one of the 25 most influential works of American culture , representing the absolute pinnacle of its era... entries.title: Mercenaries don't fight for an idea. Mercenaries are only in it for the money.

More and more often the orders go to the SSPP's new unit, and that means that old rules are no longer applicable. Who are these Typhoon soldiers, really? Competitors, enemies, or just another force that is chasing their own goals in the Zone? And how do you profit off them? entries.title: Marvel Rivals is making some big visual changes to 'cut down on battlefield chaos' which is wonderful because my old brain can't handle that level of overstimulation
entries.description: I do not possess the required amount of brain cells to digest and discern whatever happens in a Marvel Rivals team fight. Which is why I'm happy to hear NetEase is trying to dial it all down... Read more.

entries.title: The story of the Golden Corridor
entries.description: Besides the legendary Monolith, there’s another urban legend around the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. The story of the Golden Corridor. It’s a beautiful name, but don’t be fooled. Before the accident, it was just a regular service passageway between the power units. Staff used it to get to the control rooms, reactor buildings, and turbine halls. entries.title: Patch Notes - 0.34.28

This patch brings a heavy dose of engine, physics, and lobby fixes to make sure your escape runs are as stable and smooth as possible. We are committed to keeping a close eye on the live build and will continue with an ongoing effort to push fixes and polish the game's stability, as we have been. PATCH NOTES Bugs and reports that were addressed in this patch

entries.title: The FMV game where you're a hamster being doted on by three Japanese sisters was inspired by its creator's job as an animal mascot, and Grand Theft Auto 5
entries.description: Sweet Hamster Days was initially rejected by Steam, perhaps because Valve is more restrictive of games that feature sexually explicit images of real people , or possibly for some other reason we'll never know. As a designer called Oda told Automaton , "We still don’t know exactly how the platform saw things, but after revising details such as the age rating settings and re-submitting the game, it was eventually approved.".. Read more.

entries.title: That Game of Thrones RTS is still coming, still very HBO, but no longer due out this year
entries.description: Game of Thrones: War for Westeros—the upcoming RTS from PlaySide emerging from the blasted wreckage of HBO's once-water-cooler-dominating fantasy TV series—would like you to know it still exists and is still coming out. Just, you know, a little later than it originally had planned... Read more.

entries.title: GermanDevDays Indie Award 2026
entries.description: Hey Indie Devs & Indie Fans! Assemble Entertainment organizes the GermanDevDays in Frankfurt each year, the largest German-language developer conference, which is free for all students in the gaming field. A highlight of the event is the GermanDevDays Indie Award, hosted by Stefan Marcinek, where development teams can win cash prizes for their projects. In 2026, the event will once again offer a relaxed setting for game developers, industry professionals, students, and visitors to connect, share

entries.title: PUBG Global Series Circuit 3: Everything You Need To Know!
entries.description: Hello, PUBG Esports fans! After two circuits in Seoul, the PUBG Global Series is moving to Shanghai, China. PGS Circuit 3, featuring PGS 7, PGS 8, and PGS 9, will take place across three weeks from August 5 to 23. Circuit 3 also marks the beginning of the second half of the 2026 PGS season—and from this point forward, the numbers change. Every series in Circuits 3 and 4 will award twice as many PGS Points as the first half of the season. With the race to PGC 2026 entering a decisive phase, here

entries.title: 🔩 Turbine Hall
entries.description: Youth have learned nothing; those schools nowadays are useless! It was the reactor itself that exploded. The Turbine Hall just happened to be right next to it, and it took the full brunt too: fire, debris, dust, and radiation, of course. The place was enormous — over four hundred meters long. Two turbines per unit, five hundred megawatts each. When they were running, there was no point in shouting because no one would have heard you. The floor shook, the pipes hummed, and cranes crawled overhead

entries.title: The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian is out now!
entries.description: The day we've all been waiting for has finally arrived. 🎉 The Life and Suffering of Prince Jerian is now officially available on Steam! 🎉 This is a truly special moment for our entire team. For several years, we've been working on this story, striving to create not just a sequel set in the world of The Life and Suffering, but a new standalone drama where every choice has consequences, and where power can become just as great a burden as powerlessness. If you've already played the demo, we have g

entries.title: 🔮 MEOWGIC IS OUT NOW!
entries.description: Hi, enchanters! Our game is officially live and available to everyone! Grab your magic wand, gather your teammates, and get ready to set off for floating islands full of secrets. Cast a spell and watch it work. Or better yet, come up with your own spell and get ready for some fun. Thank you to everyone who has supported us and followed the game's progress. And a special, massive thank you to our Early Testers from our discord community who helped us test the game, hunted for bugs, and shared the

entries.title: SCUM: INTO THE WILD - July Update | 1.3.2.0.134527
entries.description: Hey Prisoners, The July Into the Wild update is now live! This month introduces a completely new tutorial experience inside the TEC1 Conditioning Facility, mutant deer, boar and wolves, and the Master Hunter, who arrives with new tiers of tougher quests and exclusive rewards. The update also includes reworked Island tutorials, animal behaviour improvements, official servers supporting up to 80 players, new quality-of-life features, fixes, balancing, and more changes based on player feedback. entries.title: Palworld is only growing more powerful, hitting nearly a million concurrents in its second weekend
entries.description: Palworld continues to prove that it's more than a flash-in-the-pan novelty. The survival crafting romp with legally distinct pokémon just had its second weekend since it hit 1.0, following a couple of years in early access, and it's only getting more popular... Read more.

entries.title: Activision has confirmed the Call of Duty movie setting, and it's not what I'd have picked
entries.description: I'm not sure who thinks we need a Call of Duty movie, but it's officially a thing, and it's coming out on June 30, 2028 . It's " an authentic and exciting experience for longtime fans and newcomers alike ." While this tidbit was confirmed earlier in the year, Activision and Paramount gave us little more than that in the months since. The big question was whether it will be set in the Modern Warfare or Black Ops universe, or something more unexpected, like WW2, Advanced Warfare, or Infinite Warfa

Summer season may be in full swing (well, it’s been getting both scorchy and stormy here in Europe recently), but the mists over Avalon never rest, and neither do we. Today's update is a big one: a brand-new free DLC with new items and playstyles for archers and sorcerers, a new Ultra+ graphics preset for those of you with monster PCs, our biggest discount to date as a part of the Steam Midweek Deal, and, as per usual, a fresh patch - this time, version 1.25. entries.title: Beholder: Conductor joins Steam Train Fest!

Take the soundtrack with you – the OST is also 60% off . Almost a crime (but we won’t fine you). Discount is up until Monday, August 3 . See you aboard! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2825530/Beholder_Conductor/

entries.title: We are 100K Runners!
entries.description: Hey Runners! 👋 Hope you guys are doing well. Because we… yeah, we don’t even have a proper word for it right now. 100,000 copies sold. One hundred thousand players actually owning and playing our game... It still doesn’t feel real to us. We started this as a small, passionate project, and seeing it explode like this after launch is both terrifying and the most beautiful thing that has ever happened to us. And it’s all because of you guys. Seeing so many of you jumping into the van together is mo

entries.title: Maintenance Announcement - July 21, 2026
entries.description: On Tuesday, July 21 at 10am ET/9am CT, Fallout 76 is being brought offline on all platforms to deploy an update. Please stay tuned for the patch notes which will arrive tomorrow.

entries.title: 15 years before Dishonored, Thief devs considered letting Garrett shrink himself rat-sized so he could scurry through drains and mouse holes
entries.description: Of the many remarkable abilities possessed by Dishonored hero Corvo Attano, perhaps the most remarkable is, well, possession: Corvo can possess creatures, most famously the game's plentiful rats, to get up to all sorts of trouble, including accessing locations that would be inaccessible to his full-sized body. As it turns out, this wasn't an entirely original idea. More than a decade earlier it had been considered for use in Dishonored's masterpiece progenitor, Thief: The Dark Project ... Read m

entries.title: Jennifer English, star of Baldur's Gate 3 and Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, leaves Tides of Annihilation lead role
entries.description: Jennifer English, who gained fame for her portrayal of Shadowheart in Baldur's Gate 3 and then won a BAFTA award for best performer in a leading role for Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, has announced that she is withdrawing from the role of Gwendolyn in the upcoming Tides of Annihilation in order to "properly look after [her] mental and physical health.".. Read more.

entries.title: Ubisoft promises Ghost Recon news in August, and if you're hoping that means an update on the Splinter Cell remake then I admire your optimism but sorry, no
entries.description: Less than a week after Ubisoft promised that a new Ghost Recon game is coming but probably not anytime soon , the company says it will mark the series' 25 th anniversary in August with some proper news on what's coming next... Read more.

entries.title: Thank You for Supporting ZeroSpace Early Access – Patch Deploying Tonight
entries.description: Thanks for joining ZeroSpace and supporting us during this early stage of our launch into Early Access. Early Access is a time for us to work directly with players to improve the game ahead of our future 1.0 release. It’s not just the Grell we’re talking about when we say “There Will Be Bugs!” With your help, we have identified bugs, performance and stability issues, and UI errors, and we are hard at work to release a patch tonight to address a lot of the player feedback we’ve received, and we’l

entries.title: Path of Exile 1: Curse of the Allflame QoL Changes
entries.description: In Path of Exile 1: Curse of the Allflame there are a number of improvements aimed at improving your QOL. From protection while channeling Verisium Ore to Animate Guardian's inventory and Crafting Bench in every town, you're sure to find something useful! Check out a handful of improvements in this video.

entries.title: A new Elder Scrolls is still years away, but this fun Arthurian take on the formula is 50% off right now
entries.description: It's a little surprising there aren't more The Elder Scrolls clones. Aside from Avowed, the only other example I can think of is Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon. It launched in May last year after a stint in early access, and the response was positive, perhaps surprisingly so, considering how tough it must be for a relatively young studio to make a game of this scale. entries.title: The Witcher 3's expansion reveal is scheduled for next month
entries.description: CD Projekt Red sent us all scurrying for our calendars when it announced, last May, that 2015's The Witcher 3 would be getting a brand-new expansion in the year of our lord 2027. It's called Songs of the Past, it's set to be "a little bit closer to Blood and Wine" in terms of size, and it's being co-developed alongside Fool's Theory, the studio that's also remaking the first Witcher... Read more.

entries.title: Splitgate studio 1047 Games is laying off more people just a month after releasing its latest game
entries.description: little less than a month after the release of its Titanfall-inspired shooter Empulse, developer 1047 Games has reportedly laid off more employees. While the studio hasn't made a formal announcement of the cuts, multiple employees on LinkedIn (via Game Developer ) have said they've been let go in what one described as "the third wave of studio layoffs.".. Read more.

With your support, we’ll continue improving and patching ZeroSpace throughout Early Access. entries.title: Palworld players have harnessed the power of selective breeding to create 'infinite bomb' Pals that can blow themselves up, repeatedly, forever
entries.description: Palworld, as our breeding guide shows, lets you accomplish some wild things by playing matchmaker for your creatures. You can gain early access to late-game Pals, spawn variant subspecies, and—as players have recently discovered—breed a genetic monstrosity that can repeatedly blow itself up in combat without taking any damage in the process... Read more.
